evidently.launch.launchgroupobject.CfnAb: A structure that defines one launch group in a launch. A launch group is a variation of the feature that you are including in the launch.

evidently.launch.launchgroupobject.Descr.Description: A description of the launch group.

evidently.launch.launchgroupobject.Featu.Description: The feature that this launch is using.

evidently.launch.launchgroupobject.Group.Description: A name for this launch group. It can include up to 127 characters.

evidently.launch.launchgroupobject.Varia.Description: The feature variation to use for this launch group.
